settings.heading: Some places deserve to be worn
settings.subheading: The exact latitude and longitude of the spot that changed your life - laser-engraved on jewelry made to order, one piece at a time.

settings.text: A photo fades. An address changes. But two numbers can hold a whole life - and nobody else will ever know what they mean.

settings.title: The proposal
settings.text: The exact spot you knelt down. Engraved where only you two will know what it means.

settings.title: Their birthplace
settings.text: The hospital, the town, the street. A first chapter they can carry.

settings.title: The hometown
settings.text: For the one who moved away but never really left.

settings.title: Where you met
settings.text: A coffee shop. A concert. Gate B12. The odds were impossible and it happened anyway.

settings.title: A resting place
settings.text: Quiet, personal, always close. A way to keep someone with you.

settings.title: The dream
settings.text: The place you haven't been yet. Wear it until you get there.

settings.heading: Pick the place. We engrave the rest.
settings.text: Tell us your spot — a first date, a hometown, a summit. We convert it to exact coordinates, engrave it by laser, and send you a photo proof before it ships.

settings.quote: My husband and I love them. They have the coordinates of our first trip together.
